title: LA SFR — Type V-B, R-3 stair geometry and guard outside the CRC limits
notes: Tests the new CRC R-3 stair-geometry rules: tread 9 in (< 10 in, CRC R318.5), riser 8 in (> 7-3/4 in, CRC R318.5 — exercises max_dimension_check at the fractional 7.75 limit), guard 36 in (< 42 in, CRC R312.1.2). Each has a CRC exception the engine can't rule out from a scalar (spiral/winder stairs; stair-side handrail-guards at 34-38 in), so all three emit needs_review. plan_type residential gates the IBC commercial geometry twins (EGR-*) off so only the CRC twins fire.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 987 RIDGE WAY, LOS ANGELES CA 90049
CODE ANALYSIS SHEET A-0.1
2023 LA BUILDING CODE (LABC)
Occupancy Group: R-3 (single-family dwelling)
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 24 ft
Total building area: 2,800 sf
Per-story area: 1,400 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13D residential)
Design occupant load: 10
IECC compliance path: Title 24 Part 6 prescriptive
Electrical service: 200 A service main breaker
Water closets: WC 3
Lavatories: LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front door)
EXIT 2 (rear door)
EXIT DOOR 36" min clear width
Tread depth: 9 in. Max riser: 8 in. Guard height: 36 in.
Fire alarm: NFPA 72 smoke alarms per CRC R314.

ground_truth.rationale: Table 506.2 R-3 = UL; no IBC area limit applies to a dwelling
Tread depth is 9 in, below the 10 in CRC R318.5 minimum. Spiral/winder stairs allow narrower treads, which the engine can't rule out from a scalar, so it flags needs_review.
Riser height is 8 in, over the 7-3/4 in CRC R318.5 maximum (exercises the max_dimension_check at a fractional limit). Spiral/winder stairs allow taller risers, so needs_review.
Guard height is 36 in, below the 42 in CRC R312.1.2 minimum. A stair-side guard whose top rail serves as a handrail (34-38 in) is a documented exception, so needs_review.
Handrail height is 40 in, above the 34-38 in CRC R311.7.8.1 range (exercises the HIGH side of check_range). Measurement-point/exception nuance the engine can't resolve from a scalar, so needs_review.
The IBC commercial tread rule is gated off for a residential plan type — the CRC twin scores this dimension, so the IBC rule is not-applicable (no double-fire).
IBC commercial riser rule gated off for residential — CRC twin scores it; not-applicable.
IBC commercial guard rule gated off for residential — CRC twin scores it; not-applicable.
